achievements.title: IEEE Publications
achievements.description: Published multiple research papers in prestigious IEEE journals including IEEE Transactions on Network and Service Management and IEEE Access.

achievements.title: Conference Organization
achievements.description: Organized and chaired sessions at international conferences on AI, cybersecurity, and blockchain technology.

achievements.title: International Reviewer
achievements.description: Served as reviewer for top-tier journals including IEEE, Elsevier, and Springer publications in AI and cybersecurity domains.

achievements.title: Research Innovation
achievements.description: Developed novel cryptographic intrusion detection frameworks for IoT networks, advancing the field of network security.

achievements.title: Best Paper Award
achievements.description: Received best paper award at the International Conference on Computing, Communication and Networking Technologies (ICCCNT).

achievements.title: PhD Supervision
achievements.description: Successfully supervising multiple PhD scholars working on cutting-edge research in AI, blockchain, and quantum cryptography.

achievements.title: International Collaboration
achievements.description: Established research collaborations with international universities and industry partners for joint research projects.

achievements.title: Book Chapters
achievements.description: Authored chapters in internationally published books by Springer and Elsevier on AI in cybersecurity and blockchain healthcare.
